Title: craigslist: SF bay area jobs, apartments, for sale, services, community, and events

URL Source: https://sfbay.craigslist.org/

Markdown Content:
[CL](https://www.craigslist.org/about/sites)
*   [SF bay area](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/)

*   [post](https://post.craigslist.org/c/sfo)
*   [account](https://accounts.craigslist.org/login/home)

[CL](https://www.craigslist.org/about/sites)
SF bay area

...

*   [sfc](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sfc/ "san francisco")
*   [sby](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sby/ "south bay")

*   [pen](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/pen/ "peninsula")
*   [nby](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/nby/ "north bay")
*   [scz](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/scz/ "santa cruz")

## [](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/)craigslist

#### [event calendar](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee)

| S | M | T | W | T | F | S |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 12 | [13](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-13) | [14](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-14) | [15](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-15) | [16](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-16) | [17](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-17) | [18](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-18) |
| [19](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-19) | [20](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-20) | [21](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-21) | [22](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-22) | [23](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-23) | [24](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-24) | [25](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-25) |
| [26](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-26) | [27](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-27) | [28](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-28) | [29](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-29) | [30](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-04-30) | [1](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-01) | [2](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-02) |
| [3](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-03) | [4](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-04) | [5](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-05) | [6](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-06) | [7](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-07) | [8](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-08) | [9](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/eee?sale_date=2026-05-09) |

*   [best-of-craigslist](https://www.craigslist.org/about/best/all/)

*   [what's new](https://www.craigslist.org/about/whats-new)
*   [system status](https://www.craigslist.org/about/help/system-status)

*   [craig newmark philanthropies](https://craignewmarkphilanthropies.org/)
